name: Mushrooms a L'algonquin
recipeInstructions: Preheat the oven to 400°F. Butter a shallow baking dish. Wipe the mushroom caps clean. Melt the butter in a small pan. Dip each mushroom cap in the melted butter and coat thoroughly. Place the mushroom caps, saucer side up. Squeeze fresh lemon juice over each oyster and drizzle the remaining butter over each. Put in the oven for 8-10 minutes. Serves hot or cold.
